First Amended Petition For Decree Releasing Property From Mechanic'S Lien
Off Calendar Mar-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PETER GARCIA-MEZA FIRST AMENDED PETITION FOR DECREE RELEASING PROPERTY FROM MECHANIC'S LIEN. Appearances: Nikrooz Niknahad (261.2359) respondent and opposing party appearing in propria persona. No other appearances. Respondent did not give proper notice of his intent to argue. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. Request for attorney fees denied. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Court Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
